description.ko: FLORA-9은 유기적 생명과 합성 기술의 접점을 탐구하며, 자연이 빛과 코드의 디지털 생태계로 진화한 세계를 묘사합니다.
description.en: FLORA-9 explores the intersection of organic life and synthetic technology, depicting a world where nature has evolved into a digital ecosystem of light and code.

prompt: A hyper-realistic digital forest where trees are made of glowing fiber-optic cables and leaves are translucent holographic shards. Bioluminescent flora pulsing with data streams. Macro shot of a digital orchid with circuit board patterns on its petals. High resolution, 8k, synthwave aesthetic, cinematic lighting, ethereal atmosphere, deep blues and vibrant cyans.
